events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the cal sheet's as-found error grows with input (≈1.25% span at 0% up to 2.5% span at 100%) rather than staying constant — that pattern points to a span/gain error compounded with an out-of-tolerance zero, both exceeding the ±0.5% site QC tolerance. Decision is `fail`, requiring zero adjustment + span trim and a full 5-point re-calibration before the loop can be accepted.
